info.title: Rebyu BKT Service
info.description: Bayesian Knowledge Tracing microservice for Rebyu. It trains pyBKT models, stores lesson parameters, and updates learner mastery in real time.

schema.title: Response Liveness Api V1 Bkt Health Live Get
Response Readiness Api V1 Bkt Health Ready Get
Response Ingest Mastery Events Api V1 Bkt Mastery Events Batch Post
